articles.title: Stratégie de contenu B2B en 2026 : comment choisir les bons canaux ?
articles.description: Face à la multiplication des formats et des plateformes, Nordahl Ballingall, Head of marketing chez Hellowork, nous partage ses clés pour construire une présence B2B cohérente et performante en 2026.

articles.description: Les quiz sont des outils puissants et sous-estimés en marketing pour engager les audiences, récolter des informations et renforcer la mémorisation de la marque. En combinant interactivité, simplicité et pédagogie, ils transforment l'expérience utilisateur. Des exemples de réussite, comme la…

articles.title: Comment optimiser votre contenu LinkedIn pour les LLM
articles.description: Avec l'essor des réponses générées par IA, les règles de la visibilité changent. LinkedIn partage ses apprentissages pour apparaître dans les résultats des LLM.

articles.title: #355.src - SRE et DevOps: La prod relax : désacraliser la tension dans l'ère SRE avec Kevin Davin
articles.description: "Pour moi, la prod, ça doit être un sujet qui est relaxant" Le D.E.V. de la semaine est Kevin Davin, Google Developer Expert Cloud et Kotlin, SRE chez Gradle. Dans cet épisode, on clarifie la frontière (parfois floue) entre SRE et DevOps, et comment la philosophie DevOps s'oppose au métier concret…

articles.title: Nuro receives driverless testing permit ahead of Uber robotaxi service launch
articles.description: The Silicon Valley AV startup has not started driverless testing yet.

articles.title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
articles.description: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

articles.title: Bumble’s paying users are slipping as it bets on an overhaul later this year
articles.description: The company is making a big bet that the swiping model is outdated and most matches never turn into actual dates. The company wants to fix that by redesigning profiles, changing how people interact, and focusing a lot more on getting users to meet in real life.

articles.title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
articles.description: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.

articles.title: Lucid Motors doesn’t know how many EVs it will build this year
articles.description: Lucid Motors pulled its guidance for the year, as it navigates swelling inventory and a companywide cost-cutting measure.

articles.title: As crypto cools, a16z crypto raises a $2.2B fund
articles.description: As some of the biggest VCs in crypto start to consider funding AI startups, a16z crypto's new fund will stay the course.

articles.title: Apple plans to make iOS 27 a Choose Your Own Adventure of AI models
articles.description: With Apple's latest operating system updates, users will reportedly have their pick of which third-party AI models they want to use for a host of tasks.

articles.title: ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet on his company’s monopoly: no one is coming for us
articles.description: Christophe Fouquet, who became ASML's CEO in 2024 after more than a decade at the company, sat down with this editor on the rooftop deck of his Beverly Hills hotel Tuesday morning ahead of his appearance at the Milken Institute Global Conference. Dressed in a blue suit and white shirt, he was…

articles.title: Volkswagen becomes Rivian’s top shareholder, displacing Amazon
articles.description: VW Group's stake will continue to grow under the $5.8 billion joint venture with Rivian.

articles.title: Threads finally brings messaging to the web
articles.description: By bringing messaging to the web, Threads is aligning its desktop experience more closely with competitors like X and Bluesky.

articles.title: Airbnb co-founder taps Peter Arnell as first US chief brand architect
articles.description: Arnell joins Gebbia’s National Design Studio under Trump to unify UX across 27,000 federal sites and streamline how Americans use government services.

articles.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
articles.description: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character.AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.

articles.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
articles.description: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.

articles.title: PayPal says it’s ‘becoming a technology company again’ — that means AI
articles.description: PayPal is pitching an AI-led turnaround, tying automation and restructuring to $1.5 billion in savings as it cuts jobs and works to modernize its tech stack.

articles.title: Etsy launches its app within ChatGPT as it continues its AI push
articles.description: Etsy's new native app within ChatGPT aims to be a conversational shopping experience for users.

articles.title: Kaspersky suspects Chinese hackers planted a backdoor into Daemon Tools in ‘widespread’ attack
articles.description: The cybersecurity company says it's seen thousands of infection attempts, and at least a dozen successful hacks after users installed malicious versions of the popular Windows software.

articles.title: Hackers steal students’ data during breach at education tech giant Instructure
articles.description: The data breach at education tech giant Instructure includes students' private data, according to a sample of the allegedly stolen data seen by TechCrunch.

articles.title: Meta will use AI to analyze height and bone structure to identify if users are underage

articles.title: ElevenLabs lists BlackRock, Jamie Foxx, and Eva Longoria as new investors

articles.title: CopilotKit raises $27M to help devs deploy app-native AI agents
articles.description: The Seattle-based startup's Series A round was led by Glilot Capital, NFX, and SignalFire, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

articles.description: AI coding tools might have handed your developers a productivity gain, but they’ve created a problem for your code review process. articles.title: IA : les meilleurs modèles pour le code et le développement web en mai 2026

articles.description: La plateforme PDF Spaces d'Adobe réunit vos documents, liens et notes dans un espace unique, exploitable par une IA conversationnelle. Voici comment en tirer parti.

articles.title: Face à l’explosion de la musique IA, Qobuz prône la « curation humaine »
articles.description: Face à l'explosion des titres IA, Qobuz revendique une curation 100 % humaine et une tolérance zéro. Son directeur musique, Marc Zisman, détaille cette stratégie à BDM.

articles.description: Développé par Google et Microsoft, le WebMCP permet aux sites web d'exposer des actions structurées aux agents IA. Décryptage.

articles.title: As workers worry about AI, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says AI is ‘creating an enormous number of jobs’
articles.description: The Nvidia CEO seems to feel that claims of AI's job-killing potential have been greatly exaggerated.

articles.title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy to raise up to $1.3B in IPO
articles.description: Enhanced geothermal startup Fervo Energy’s IPO could value the company at up to $6.5 billion.

articles.title: US government warns of severe CopyFail bug affecting major versions of Linux
articles.description: U.S. cybersecurity agency CISA says the CopyFail bug is being actively used in hacking campaigns, and poses a major risk to servers and data centers that rely on Linux.

articles.title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
articles.description: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

articles.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades

articles.title: Katie Haun raises $1B for new venture funds
articles.description: Katie Haun announced on Monday that $1 billion has been raised across new funds to continue the firm’s thesis of backing crypto and blockchain startups.

articles.title: Hackers are mass-exploiting the cPanel bug to gain control of thousands of websites

articles.title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious

articles.title: Elon Musk sent ominous texts to Greg Brockman, Sam Altman after asking for a settlement, OpenAI claims
articles.description: Musk texted OpenAI's president and co-founder saying that he and CEO Sam Altman "will be the most hated men in America" if OpenAI doesn't settle the suit.

articles.title: US healthcare marketplaces shared citizenship and race data with ad tech giants

articles.title: Amazon opens up its global logistics network to all businesses

articles.description: The BOGO offer is live. For a limited time, buy one pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 and get 50% off a second of the same ticket type. Offer ends this Friday, May 8. Save here.

articles.title: Barocal can cool your food and drink by squeezing a hunk of plastic crystals

articles.title: DoorDash adds AI tools to speed up merchant onboarding, edit photos of dishes
articles.description: DoorDash on Monday added new AI-powered tools that let merchants speed up onboarding, edit photos to make dishes look better, and create new websites from existing content.

articles.title: Ouster’s new color lidar is coming to replace cameras

articles.description: Capable de détecter des vulnérabilités, d'analyser des malwares ou d'effectuer des pentests, GPT-5.5-Cyber s'annonce comme le pendant d'OpenAI à Mythos. Son déploiement restera, lui aussi, très encadré.
